raw_source.title: Beijing /bladerite/20k~30k CNY
raw_source.body:
Solana Smart Contract Developer

Company: Bladerite

**Responsibilities:**
    1. Develop and maintain company smart contracts.
    2. Collaborate with business teams to monitor and conduct data surveillance.

**Salary Range**: 20k-30k CNY

**Location**: Beijing, China

**Contact**: yangmanuel731270812@gmail.com

**Employment Type**: Full-time / Onsite

**Job Requirements:**
    1. Rust: Proficient in basic Rust syntax, with an in-depth understanding of Rust in Solana.
    2. Solana Blockchain: Experience with Solana blockchain technology, including developing smart contracts using Anchor, and a good understanding of the Solana ecosystem.
    3. JavaScript/TypeScript: Experience with front-end or back-end projects using JavaScript or TypeScript, proficient in Node.js.
    4. Jito, ALT, Versioned Transactions: Proficient in sending transactions using Jito, ALT, and Versioned Transactions, and understanding Metaplex.
    5. EVM Development: Familiar with EVM development, proficient in developing Solidity contracts using Hardhat and Foundry.

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
